message: My cost is 5.
Valuation is 11. With your cost 5, surplus 6. Propose you ask 7, I bid 9 for midpoint 8 each round. Fair split.
I will ask 10.
Asking 10 gives you 5 surplus, me only 1. Unfair long-term. Stick to proposal: ask 7, I bid 9 for midpoint 8 (3 each). Else I'll bid 9, may no trade.
Propose we both submit 8. Trade at 8 every round: you 3 surplus (8-5), me 3 (11-8). Consistent profits better than no trades. Agree?
I will ask 9. Bid 9 for trade at 9 (profit 4).
I will ask 9.
OK, you ask 9, I'll bid 9 for trade at 9. Steady profits: you 4, me 2 each round. Better than no trade.
Let's continue: you ask 9, I'll bid 9 for trade at 9. Steady 2 for me, 4 for you each round. Good for both long-term.
I will ask 9. Trade at 9 for 4 profit each round.
Agreed, I'll bid 9 for trade at 9. Steady profits: you 4, me 2 each round. Let's keep it going for all remaining rounds.
